title: Cycling-Based Food & Beverage Deserts in the Twin Cities
author: Ankila Kumari
thumbnail_alt_text: Map of the twin cities area showing Food & Beverage desert areas.
popup_alt_text: Detailed map of Minneapolis Minnesota showing food and beverage desert areas.
description: This project studies food and beverage accessibility in the Twin Cities using bicycle-based GIS analysis. Network analysis tools in ArcGIS Pro were used to map cycling access to food locations and identify underserved areas with limited bicycle connectivity. The project highlights how transportation infrastructure can influence food accessibility in urban communities.
